business.name: Miam Consultants (PTY) LTD
business.description: We are an accounting firm that specializes in uplifting small, medium and large entities. We offer comprehensive financial services tailored to your business needs.

services.title: Accounting
services.description: Full-scope accounting solutions to keep your books accurate and compliant.

services.title: Audit
services.description: Independent statutory audits conducted with precision and professionalism.

services.title: Independent Reviews
services.description: Credible independent reviews for businesses that require limited assurance.

services.title: Tax Consulting
services.description: Strategic tax planning and consulting to minimize liability and ensure compliance.

services.title: Business Consulting
services.description: Expert advisory to help your business grow, restructure, and thrive.

services.title: Internal Audit
services.description: Robust internal audit frameworks to protect your organization from risk.

services.title: Taxation Services
services.description: Comprehensive personal and corporate tax filing and advisory services.

services.title: Company Secretarial
services.description: Full company secretarial services including CIPC registrations and compliance.

services.title: Public Sector
services.description: Specialized public sector accounting, audit, and governance advisory.

testimonials.headline: STREAMLINED FINANCES THAT FUELLED OUR EXPANSION
testimonials.subheadline: TAX COMPLIANCE BROUGHT CLARITY ACROSS THREE BRANCHES
testimonials.quote: Miam Consultants transformed how we manage our finances. From tax filings to monthly management accounts, they handle it all with precision. We've grown from one store to three in two years — and their support made that possible.
testimonials.author: Sipho Ndlovu

testimonials.headline: AUDIT-READY BOOKS THAT OPENED NEW CONTRACT DOORS
testimonials.subheadline: INDEPENDENT REVIEWS HELPED US WIN GOVERNMENT TENDERS
testimonials.quote: Before Miam, our financial records were a mess. Their team cleaned everything up, performed an independent review, and within months we were qualifying for tenders we never could before. Absolutely game-changing.
testimonials.author: Lungelo Dlamini

testimonials.headline: PEACE OF MIND KNOWING OUR NUMBERS ARE IN EXPERT HANDS
testimonials.subheadline: TAX CONSULTING SAVED US SIGNIFICANTLY YEAR ON YEAR
testimonials.quote: Running a medical practice leaves no time for tax complexity. Miam's consultants have been invaluable — proactive, knowledgeable, and always available. They've saved us thousands in tax every single year.
testimonials.author: Dr. Priya Naidoo

faqs.question: WHAT TYPES OF BUSINESSES DO YOU WORK WITH?
faqs.answer: We work with small, medium and large entities across all sectors — from retail and construction to healthcare and the public sector. If you need professional accounting support, we are here for you.

faqs.question: HOW EASY IS IT TO SWITCH TO MIAM CONSULTANTS?
faqs.answer: Very easy. We handle the transition from your existing accountant, collect all prior records, and ensure continuity of your financial reporting. We do the heavy lifting so you can focus on your business.

faqs.question: DO YOU HANDLE SARS SUBMISSIONS AND TAX COMPLIANCE?
faqs.answer: Yes. We are registered Tax Practitioners with SARS and handle all aspects of tax compliance — including VAT, PAYE, income tax returns, and provisional tax submissions.

faqs.question: WHAT IS AN INDEPENDENT REVIEW AND DOES MY BUSINESS NEED ONE?
faqs.answer: An independent review provides limited assurance on your financial statements, required for private companies that do not qualify for an audit. We will assess your Public Interest Score and advise on exactly what your business requires.

faqs.question: DO YOU OFFER SERVICES FOR PUBLIC SECTOR ENTITIES?
faqs.answer: Yes. We specialize in public sector accounting, governance, and audit work aligned with CIGFARO and relevant legislative frameworks. Contact us to discuss your specific requirements.
